top_signals.title: Rising Heat Strains US Power Grid in Need of Off-Season Repairs
top_signals.summary: A blast of late-spring heat is adding strain to the largest US power grid as operators race to repair equipment ahead of rising demand and hotter-than-normal weather expected this summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
